info.title: Task Tracker API
info.description: REST API for the Task Tracker backend

200.description: Login successful or password change required
Reset email sent (always returns success to prevent enumeration)

post.summary: Change password using a temp token (Authorization: Bearer <tempToken>)
Refresh access token using refreshToken cookie

get.summary: Initiate Google OAuth flow (redirects to Google)

post.summary: Register a new company and its admin user
Create a department and its department head (admin only)

get.summary: Get all members of a department
Get all users across DB (super_admin only)
Get lightweight list of company colleagues (any authenticated user)

post.summary: Upload profile picture (jpg, png, webp — max 5MB)

put.summary: Replace profile picture (jpg, png, webp — max 5MB)
